center.name: José Alberto de Oliveira Anchieta
center.summary: José Alberto de Oliveira Anchieta是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Anchieta's sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Angola, the DRC, Malawi, Mozambique, Tanzania, and Zambia, and is named after José Alberto de Oliveira Anchieta

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Angola, the DRC, Malawi, Mozambique, Tanzania, and Zambia, and is named after José Alberto de Oliveira Anchieta
